login.title: Mosaic Admin
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your Mosaic service
login.serverUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty to use current address, e.g. http://...
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
login.fillCredentials: Please fill in username and password

dashboard.changeFailed: Change failed. Please check current password.

bots.title: Bot Management
bots.name: Name
bots.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe this bot's persona, duties, or reply style
bots.tagsPlaceholder: Press Enter to add a tag
bots.autoReplyDesc: Automatically trigger this bot to reply when creating a Memo
bots.emptyHint: Click "New Bot" in the top right to get started

aiConfig.title: AI Model Configuration
aiConfig.maxTokensDesc: Maximum tokens per reply. Leave empty for default (512).
aiConfig.vectorDimDesc: Auto-detected on first use. Can be manually overridden.
aiConfig.capabilitiesDesc: Auto-detected after selecting a model. Can be manually overridden.

automation.title: Automation Settings
automation.autoTagDesc: Auto-generate 1-4 tags when creating a memo without tags
automation.autoSummaryDesc: Auto-generate a one-sentence summary when creating a memo
automation.autoDiaryDesc: Auto-generate and archive diary from today's memos at end of day
automation.minMemosDesc: Minimum number of memos before auto-generating diary
automation.minCharsDesc: Minimum total character count before auto-generating diary

memory.title: Memory / RAG Index
memory.empty: No memos yet. Index will be built automatically after the first entry.
memory.backfillStarted: Index backfill has started, running in the background
memory.backfillFailed: Start failed. Please check Embedding model configuration.
memory.pendingIndex: {{n}} memos not indexed, click to backfill
